_comment: CAT-54 verification smoke-test manifest: a self-contained (no CAT-9 registry dependency) 4-category mix covering every checkpoint-backed category the R9 mix defines (catanatron_value excluded -- no engine is wired for it in this ticket, that is CAT-56). Replace the placeholder checkpoint paths below with real archived champion checkpoints before running. Intended usage: tools/generate_gumbel_selfplay_data.py --checkpoint <producer_checkpoint> --opponent-mix-manifest configs/opponent_mix/opponent_mix_smoke_test.json --games 40 --workers 1 (a few dozen games across the mix categories, per the ticket's verification step -- run on a host with the compiled catanatron_rs engine).
